_comment: Item definitions for Realm of Shadow. Edit this file to add, remove, or tweak items without touching code.

Fists.description: Bare knuckles. Not much, but always available.

Dagger.description: A short, light blade. Good for melee and throwing.

Club.description: A simple wooden club. Cheap but sturdy.

Mace.description: A heavy flanged club, favored by clerics.

Sling.description: A simple ranged weapon that hurls stones.

Axe.description: A single-headed battle axe. Reliable and brutal.

Sword.description: A well-balanced longsword. Standard fighter fare.

Spear.description: A long thrusting weapon with good reach.

Broad Axe.description: A massive double-headed axe. Devastating blows.

Bow.description: A sturdy longbow. Excellent at range.

Iron Sword.description: A finely forged iron blade. Sharp and durable.

Gloves.description: Enchanted gauntlets that strike with magic force.

Halberd.description: A polearm combining axe and spear. Fearsome reach.

Silver Bow.description: A silver-inlaid bow. Deadly against the undead.

Sun Sword.description: A radiant blade infused with solar energy.

Mystic Sword.description: An ancient blade pulsing with arcane power.

Leather.description: Toughened leather armor. Light and flexible.

Chain.description: Interlocking metal rings. Good all-round defense.

Exotic.description: Mysterious armor of unknown origin. Supreme defense.

Healing Herb.description: A fragrant herb that restores a small amount of HP.

Antidote.description: A bitter tincture that cures poison.

Torch.description: A wooden torch. Lights the way in dark places.

Rope.description: A sturdy hemp rope. Useful for climbing.

Holy Water.description: Blessed water from a sacred spring. Burns the undead.

Scroll of Fire.description: A single-use scroll containing a fire spell.

Mana Potion.description: A shimmering blue liquid that restores magic points.

Lockpick.description: A set of fine tools for opening locked chests.

Smoke Bomb.description: A small bomb that creates a blinding cloud.
